title: Create: Better Stock Ticker
description: A Create addon that adds a new Stock Keeper block and fully customizable NPCs, along with support for creating Stock Keepers above and below the Stock Ticker.
body:
# Better Stock Ticker

Tired of chaining a **Stock Ticker** to a **Blaze Burner** just to request items from your Create logistics network? **Better Stock Ticker** adds the **Stock Keeper** — one block that combines both roles into a single, self-contained station.

---

## What It Does

The Stock Keeper is a full member of Create’s logistical network. It behaves like a Stock Ticker with an integrated blaze stock keeper, giving you request and category UIs **without** placing or maintaining a separate blaze burner nearby.

---

## Features

### Stock Keeper block

- **All-in-one logistics block** — network linking, stock requests, and category editing in one placement
- **No adjacent blaze required** — the keeper always counts as present for Create’s stock keeper logic
- **In-world upgrade** — use a Blaze Burner on a placed Stock Ticker to convert it in place and **keep your network frequency and settings** (no break-and-replace)
- **Crafting recipe** — Stock Ticker + Blaze Burner → Stock Keeper (network data can carry over from the ticker ingredient when applicable)
- **Familiar controls**
  - **Right-click** → stock request UI
  - **Shift + right-click** → category UI
  - Shopping list interaction and payment collection work like Create’s stock ticker
- **Animated blaze cube** — the blaze head inside the block smoothly turns to face nearby players, including up and down

### Improved vanilla Stock Tickers

- **Vertical blaze keepers** — on any Create **Stock Ticker**, a vanilla **Blaze Burner** placed **above or below** counts as a stock keeper (no need to only place it beside the ticker). Blaze burners can also link from any adjacent side
- **Vertical seat keepers** — a mob in a Create **Seat** placed **above or below** a Stock Ticker also counts as a stock keeper, with the same logistics hat and request interaction as side-mounted keepers
- **Mob keeper settings** — **Shift + right-click** a seated stock keeper mob to open **Stock Keeper Settings**:
  - **Disable AI** — freeze the mob in place
  - **Look at Player** — keep tracking nearby players even with AI off
  - **Mute Sounds** — silence mob sounds
  - **Invulnerable** — prevent damage
  - Settings persist on the mob and survive world reloads; disabled AI keeps the mob’s facing unless **Look at Player** is enabled

### New NPCs (WIP)
  - 6 preset poses: Standing, Crouching, Waving, Pointing, Sitting, Thinking
  - Custom pose editing with per-part rotation controls (head, body, arms, legs)
  - 3D position offset with yaw adjustment
  - Subtle idle breathing animation (arm bob + leg sway, toggleable)
  - Full NPC editor with live preview
  - Display name, skin username, and head equipment
  - Idle Animation toggle per NPC
  - All settings synced over network, saved to NBT

---

## Dependencies

| Mod | Version |
|-----|---------|
| Minecraft | 1.21.1 |
| NeoForge | 21.1.233+ |
| Create | 6.0.10 – 6.1.0 |


*Better Stock Ticker — less clutter, same logistics power.*
